sections.heading: Objective
sections.intro: The goal of this task is to:
items: Explore Bootstrap 5's official documentation and Bootstrap Examples.
Understand their structure & usage.
Design clean, modern, and responsive HTML pages by remixing those components.
Focus on visual appeal, component synergy, and layout composition — not just copy-pasting.

sections.heading: Scope of Work

items.text: Review the official Bootstrap 5 Examples section →

items: Extract high-quality UI patterns, such as:
footer: Combine selected components into original, visually appealing pages
Ensure all pages are responsive and polished
Submit both the source code and a live working URL (GitHub Pages / Netlify)

sections.heading: Technologies to Be Used
items: HTML5
CSS3
Git & GitHub (for version control and hosting)

groups.title: Setup
items: Use Bootstrap 5 via CDN
Create a file structure: index.html, about.html, contact.html

groups.title: Component Collection
items: Explore Bootstrap Example Pages
Identify attractive & reusable UI components
Collect: navbars, cards, sidebars, hero layouts, etc.

groups.title: Page Design & Composition
items: Build at least 3 full pages:
Home Page → Navbar, Hero, Feature section, Footer
ℹ️ About/Services Page
Contact Page → with a working form

groups.title: Styling & Final Touches
items: Maintain consistent spacing, colors, and layout
Ensure responsiveness (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Use Bootstrap utility classes smartly

groups.title: Hosting & Submission
items: Push project to GitHub
Submit both: GitHub Repo URL & Live Deployed Link

sections.heading: Project Reflection (Mandatory)
sections.intro: Along with the project submission, interns must provide a short written report that explains:
items: How they achieved the project step by step
Whether they used AI tools (like ChatGPT), Bootstrap docs, or copied snippets
What challenges they faced and how they solved them
A clear story of their learning journey and completion process
The total time taken for completion (in hours/days), specified neatly
sections.note: Transparency is important. It's okay to use external help or tools, but interns must clearly state it.

sections.heading: Expected Outcome
sections.intro: By completing this task, the intern will:
items: Gain hands-on practice with Bootstrap 5
Learn how to remix components creatively
Improve UI/UX sense & page composition skills
Deliver clean, responsive, attractive web pages
Learn the importance of documenting their process honestly

sections.heading: Guidelines
items: Use only Bootstrap 5 as the main framework
Interns may improvise and add custom HTML/CSS content if Bootstrap does not provide a specific component — they are free to imagine and build those themselves
Do not copy-paste full example pages → extract & remix
Focus on clarity, polish, and modern design
Keep code clean & well-indented
Ask for feedback whenever stuck

sections.heading: Submission Format
items: Project Reflection Report → Markdown (README.md) or PDF, included in the repo
